about: Stress: fast interleaving, misleading titles, work that looks like browsing. Failures here are findings, not bugs.

steps.text: Shopping list draft (actually PLite copy testing): calm words for the return card. You were away 20 minutes. Pick up here.
Vacation ideas (actually Phossil naming brainstorm): gate names, crosswalk, traceability register.
One more pass on the return card copy, then ship it.

answer_key.next_action: finish the copy pass and ship it
